description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 25 hrs 48 mins coding, with a daily average of 2 hrs 6 mins. His coding time was mainly in Other (43%), Java (39%), and Markdown (15%). The provided data does not list any public GitHub repositories, commits, PRs, or new repos this week.
